===================
===================
===================
=== BOB DYLAN - 1986 Tour Compilation July 21st 1986 plus Fillers_Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN - 1986 Tour Compilation: July 21st 1986 plus Fillers (dylantree Fan Release)

Bob Dylan with Tom Petty & THe Heartbreakers
Brendan Byrne Arena
East Rutherford, New York
July 21st 1986

plus Various Dates & Venues, 1986

SOURCE: Trade CDRs > EAC > FLAC Level 8 Align on Sector Boundaries

High Resolution Artwork Included

JTT, July 2011

VOLUME ONE: DISC ONE
UNCHAIN MY HEART
POSITIVELY FOURTH STREET
CLEAN CUT KID
I'LL REMEMBER YOU
SHOT OF LOVE
WE HAD IT ALL
MASTERS OF WAR
STRAIGHT INTO DARKNESS
THINK ABOUT ME
THE WAITING
BREAKDOWN
TIMES THEY ARE A-CHANGIN'
ONE TOO MANY MORNINGS
HARD RAIN'S A-GONNA FALL

VOLUME ONE: DISC TWO
I FORGOT MORE THAN YOU'LL EVER KNOW
BAND OF THE HAND
WHEN THE NIGHT COMES FALLING
LONESOME TOWN
BALLAD OF A THIN MAN
FORGET ABOUT ME
SPIKE
DON'T DO ME LIKE THAT
REFUGEE
RAINY DAY WOMEN #12 & 35
I DREAMED I SAW ST. AUGUSTINE
ACROSS THE BORDERLINE
I AND I

VOLUME TWO: DISC ONE
HAPPY BIRTHDAY
LIKE A ROLLING STONE
IN THE GARDEN
BLOWIN' IN THE WIND
UNION SUNDOWN
KNOCKIN' ON HEAVEN'S DOOR

GIRL FROM THE NORTH COUNTRY (BERKELEY, 6/14)
TO RAMONA (SACRAMENTO, 6/12)
IT AIN'T ME BABE (SACRAMENTO, 6/12)
LONESOME DEATH OF HATTIE CARROLL (BERKELEY, 6/13)
DON'T THINK TWICE (BERKELEY, 6/14)
SONG TO WOODY (RENO, 6/11)
IT'S ALRIGHT MA (I'M ONLY BLEEDING (NAGOYA, 3/8)

VOLUME TWO: DISC TWO
MR. TAMBOURINE MAN (NEW YORK CITY, 7/17)
I WANT YOU (NEW YORK CITY, 7/17)
WE THREE (NEW YORK CITY, 7/17)
HOUSE OF THE RISING SUN (NEW YORK CITY, 7/17)
TRUST YOURSELF (BUFFALO, 7/4)
EMOTIONALLY YOURS (HARTFORD, 7/11)
LAY LADY LAY (HARTFORD, 7/11)
JUST LIKE TOM THUMB'S BLUES
LENNY BRUCE (NAGOYA, 3/8)
GOTTA SERVE SOMEBODY (VANCOUVER, 8/1)
ALL ALONG THE WATCHTOWER (PHILADELPHIA, 7/20)
BROWNSVILLE GIRL (PASO ROBLES, 8/6)
I STILL MISS SOMEONE (CLARKSTON, 7/1)
ROCK WITH ME BABY (COSTA MESA, 6/17)
LET THE GOOD TIMES ROLL (EAST TROY, 6/27)
RED CADILLAC AND A BLACK MOUSTACHE (EAST TROY, 6/27)
URANIUM ROCK (CHICAGO, 6/29)
EVEN THE LOSERS (SARATOGA SPRINGS, 7/13)
SO YOU WANT TO BE A ROCK'N'ROLL STAR (PHILADELPHIA, 7/20)

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
PLEASE DO NOT CONVERT TO LOSSY FILES AND UPLOAD LINKS ON EXPECTING RAIN OR OTHER SITES
++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
